items.title: OpenAI Ships GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna to the Public

key_claims.source: Neowin Jul 8, Axios Jul 8, Engadget, Business Standard

key_claims.claim: Government testing by Dept of Commerce CISA

caveats: Pricing unconfirmed from OpenAI primary — check platform.openai.com

items.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-Live Full-Duplex Voice Models

key_claims.claim: Full-duplex architecture: processes input and output simultaneously
Delegates complex queries to GPT-5.5 backend

caveats: API pricing not confirmed in secondary sources

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Code and Cowork in Public Beta for Government

key_claims.claim: SCIM-group-based rate limits and hard spending caps
Tamper-evident audit logs for ATO support

items.title: Alibaba Bans Claude Code Over Alleged Tracking Code

key_claims.claim: Ban effective July 10, switch to Qoder
Anthropic described it as anti-abuse experiment from March

caveats: No official Alibaba press release found
Tracking behavior technically verified only by single Reddit user (T4 for that specific claim)
Anthropic confirmed code existed but disputes framing

items.title: Illinois Signs AI Safety Measures Act with Mandatory Annual Audits

key_claims.claim: $500M annual revenue threshold for covered entities
Annual independent third-party audits required (first in any US state)
key_claims.source: Gov. Pritzker newsroom, Capitol News Illinois

items.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro Targets July 17 Launch After Architectural Rebuild

key_claims.source: TechTimes, HackerNoon, BigGo (all T3, no Google primary)
Press reports; Google confirmed 3.5 family at I/O — 2M figure unconfirmed specifically

caveats: All specifications are press-reported from unnamed sources
